auth.registerDesc: Fill in the details below to get started

providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: Manage your AI provider connections.
providers.addProviderDesc: Configure a new AI provider connection.
providers.noProvidersDesc: Add your first AI provider to get started.
providers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone and will remove all associated models.
providers.testFailed: Connection test failed, please check your configuration
providers.createFailed: Failed to create provider. Please try again.
providers.updateFailed: Failed to update provider. Please try again.
providers.notFoundDesc: The provider you are looking for does not exist.
providers.providerDetailsDesc: Enter the connection details for your AI provider.
providers.nameHint: A friendly name to identify this provider.
providers.protocolLocked: Protocol cannot be changed after creation.
providers.baseUrlHint: The API endpoint for this provider. Auto-filled based on protocol.
providers.apiKeyKeep: Leave blank to keep current key
providers.apiKeyKeepHint: Leave blank to keep the existing API key.
providers.apiKeyHint: Your API key will be stored securely.

agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: Create and manage your AI agents.
agents.noAgentsDesc: Create your first AI agent to get started.
agents.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
agents.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive "{{name}}"? Archived agents cannot be used for chat or API calls.
agents.createFailed: Failed to create agent. Please try again.
agents.updateFailed: Failed to update agent. Please try again.
agents.archiveFailed: Failed to archive agent. Please try again.
agents.unarchiveFailed: Failed to unarchive agent. Please try again.
agents.notFoundDesc: The agent you are looking for does not exist.
agents.publishDesc: Create a snapshot of the current agent configuration as a new version.
agents.changelogPlaceholder: Describe what changed in this version...
agents.publishFailed: Failed to publish version. Please try again.
agents.agentConfigDesc: Set up the basic configuration for your new agent.
agents.nameHint: A descriptive name for your agent.
agents.descHint: Optional description of the agent's purpose.
agents.providerHint: The AI provider to use for this agent.
agents.providersRequired: Providers are required to create an agent. Please try refreshing.
agents.modelHint: The model to use. Available models depend on the selected provider.
agents.systemPromptHint: The system prompt defines the agent's behavior and personality.
agents.systemPromptDesc: Define the behavior and personality of your agent.
agents.temperatureHint: Recommended: Code/Math 0.0 · Data extraction 1.0 · General chat 1.3 · Translation 1.3 · Creative writing 1.5
agents.maxTokensHint: Maximum number of tokens the model can generate in a response.
agents.tempError: Temperature must be a number between 0 and 2.
agents.maxTokensError: Max tokens must be a positive number.
agents.thinkingEnabledHint: Enable deep reasoning for complex tasks. Temperature will be ignored when enabled. Only supported by certain models.
agents.versionManagementDesc: Manage versions, share links, and conversations for {{name}}.
agents.archivedFailed: Failed to archive agent. Please try again.
agents.unarchivedFailed: Failed to unarchive agent. Please try again.

versions.noVersionsDesc: Publish a version to start sharing your agent.

shareLinks.title: Share Links
shareLinks.subtitle: Manage share links for your published versions.
shareLinks.noVersionsDesc: Publish a version first to create share links.
shareLinks.createDesc: Generate a shareable link for version v{{version}}.
shareLinks.linkCreatedDesc: Copy this link to share with others.
shareLinks.noLinks: No share links for this version.
shareLinks.deactivateDesc: This will permanently disable this share link. Anyone with this link will no longer be able to start new conversations. Existing conversations will not be affected.

conversations.title: Conversations
conversations.subtitle: View conversations from shared links.
conversations.selectConversation: Select a conversation to view messages.
conversations.noConversationsDesc: Conversations will appear here when users chat via share links.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Manage skill templates for your agents.
skills.createSkillDesc: Define a new skill for your agents.
skills.noSystemSkillsDesc: System skills will appear here when available.
skills.noCustomSkillsDesc: Create your first custom skill to get started.
skills.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
skills.createFailed: Failed to create skill. Please try again.
skills.updateFailed: Failed to update skill. Please try again.
skills.notFoundDesc: The skill you are looking for does not exist.
skills.skillDetailsDesc: Configure the skill name, tags, and content.
skills.nameHint: A descriptive name for this skill.
skills.descHint: Optional description of the skill's purpose.
skills.tagsHint: Comma-separated list of tags for categorization.
skills.contentHint: The full skill content that will be provided to agents.
skills.deleteSystemConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete system skill "{{name}}"? This will affect all users. This action cannot be undone.
skills.addSystemSkillDesc: Create a new system skill available to all users.

prompts.title: Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Manage your prompt template library
prompts.createPromptDesc: Create a new prompt template for your library
prompts.addSystemPromptDesc: Add a new prompt template to the marketplace
prompts.deletePromptDesc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
prompts.deleteSystemPromptDesc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This system prompt is visible to all users.
prompts.nameHint: A descriptive name for your prompt
prompts.descHint: A brief description of the prompt's purpose
prompts.noSystemPromptsDesc: Marketplace prompts will appear here once added by administrators
prompts.noCustomPromptsDesc: Create your first prompt template to get started
prompts.notFoundDesc: The prompt you're looking for doesn't exist or has been deleted
prompts.selectPromptDesc: Browse the prompt library and select a template

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.subtitle: Manage Model Context Protocol server connections.
mcp.addServerDesc: Configure a new MCP server connection.
mcp.addMarketplaceDesc: Add a new server to the marketplace for all users.
mcp.noMarketplaceDesc: Marketplace MCP servers will appear here when available.
mcp.noCustomDesc: Add your first MCP server to get started.
mcp.testFailed: Connection test failed, please check your configuration
mcp.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
mcp.deleteMarketplaceConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This will remove it from the marketplace for all users.
mcp.createFailed: Failed to create MCP server. Please try again.
mcp.updateFailed: Failed to update MCP server. Please try again.
mcp.notFoundDesc: The MCP server you are looking for does not exist.
mcp.serverDetailsDesc: Enter the connection details for your MCP server.
mcp.nameHint: A friendly name to identify this MCP server.
mcp.descPlaceholder: Describe what this MCP server provides...
mcp.descHint: Optional description of this server's capabilities.
mcp.commandHint: The executable command to run the MCP server.
mcp.headersHint: Optional HTTP headers as JSON object.
mcp.headersError: Invalid JSON format. Please enter a valid JSON object.

agentMcp.boundServersDesc: MCP servers currently attached to this agent. Expand to manage enabled tools.
agentMcp.noBound: No MCP servers bound yet. Add one from the list below.
agentMcp.availableServersDesc: Add MCP servers to give your agent access to external tools.
agentMcp.noAvailable: No additional MCP servers available. Create one in the MCP Servers page first.
agentMcp.toolsDesc: Select which tools this agent can use. Leave all unchecked to enable all tools.
agentMcp.noTools: No tools discovered for this server. Try testing the connection on the MCP Servers page first.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Manage API keys for the OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
apiKeys.keyCreatedDesc: Copy your API key now. It will not be shown again.
apiKeys.createDesc: Create a new API key for programmatic access.
apiKeys.createWarning: Make sure to copy your API key now. You will not be able to see it again.
apiKeys.agentHint: Bind this key to a specific agent, or leave blank to access all agents. Use a published version ID as the model field in requests.
apiKeys.noKeysDesc: Create your first API key to use the OpenAI-compatible API.
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke "{{name}}"? Any applications using this key will no longer be able to authenticate.
apiKeys.usageDesc: Use your API key with any OpenAI-compatible client. The endpoint follows the OpenAI Chat Completions API format.

chat.title: Chat
chat.startConversation: Start a conversation by sending a message below.
chat.testAgent: Test your agent by sending a message.
chat.chooseConversation: Choose an existing conversation or start a new one.
chat.confirmDeleteConversationDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation? This action cannot be undone.

shared.expiredDesc: This share link has expired, reached its usage limit, or is no longer valid.
